# backend/core/httpx_audit_hook.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:01:41Z

## Purpose
httpx auto-instrumentation hook · Iter 36.

Monkey-patches httpx.Client.request + httpx.AsyncClient.request to
auto-log every outbound call to outbound_audit. Operator opts in by
calling install_httpx_audit_hook() in main.py.

Per §47.6 + §38.3 · supply-chain visibility · transparent which
external services are being called.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import time
- from `typing` import Any

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `install_httpx_audit_hook()`: Install hook · returns True if successful.
- `is_installed()`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Async variant
